nasb.text: So when it comes to pass—as surely it will—then they will know that a prophet has been in their midst.”

esv.text: When this comes—and come it will!—then they will know that a prophet has been among them.”

cnv.text: 看哪！這事必定應驗，到那時候，他們就知道在他們中間有先知了。”

ccb.text: 看吧，我所说的必定应验。当一切应验的时候，他们就知道有先知在他们当中。”
